category_sources: source_facts.description says Glow renders markdown on the CLI; official GitHub README describes it as a terminal-based markdown reader.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glow; official GitHub README uses the display name Glow.
docs_sources: Official charmbracelet/glow repository README documents installation, CLI/TUI usage, configuration, and styles.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/charmbracelet/glow, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies markdown rendering on the CLI; official README describes Glow as a terminal markdown reader with CLI and TUI modes.
